title: ItemPhysic Lite
description: items fall to the ground and do not float
body: This is the Lite version of ItemPhysic and therefore visual only (client-side only)! Can be used on vanilla servers! ItemPhysic Full Requires CreativeCore **Features** * enhanced item animation Old Downloads **Addons** [ItemPhysic Guns](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/itemphysic-guns): Addon for ItemPhysic (Lite or Full) that fixes rendering of 3D guns from TaCZ and Superb Warfare when dropped. Looking for a server to play with your friends. Our sponsor got you covered: [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers!
